title: Document backend registration mechanism in secretx-core crate docs
description: The secretx-core crate module documentation (lib.rs:1-4) mentions that 'Backend crates implement SecretStore and/or SigningBackend' but does not mention the backend registration system. A new backend contributor would not know that they must also add an inventory::submit! block. Update the module docs to briefly explain: (1) that backends register themselves at compile time using inventory::submit!, (2) the three registration types (BackendRegistration, WritableBackendRegistration, SigningBackendRegistration), (3) link to the type docs for details. This improves discoverability for contributors writing new backends.
